title: Borehole
description: Borehole: A representation of a borehole defined by a coordinate system, start point and end point based on the AGS schema.

Id.description: Location identifier for the borehole unique to the project (LOCA_ID).

Top.description: The top of the borehole within the coordinate system provided (LOCA_NATE, LOCA_NATEN, LOCA_GL). Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

Bottom.description: The bottom of the borehole within the coordinate system provided (LOCA_ETRV, LOCA_NTRV, LOCA_FDEP). Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

CoordinateSystem.description: The coordinate system referenced by the top and bottom point. (LOCA_GREF, LOCA_NATD). Cartesian: A three-dimensional Cartesian coordinate system, as defined by a set of mutually orthogonal unit vectors and a common origin point

Strata.description: A list of objects containing the strata found within the borehole, based on the GEOL table.

ContaminantSamples.description: A list of objects containing the contaminant samples found within the borehole, based on the ERES table.

GeotechnicalTestResults.description: A list of objects containing the geotechnical results found within the borehole.

BoreholeProperties.description: A list of properties related to the borehole.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
